creator.name: Shin Uchida
creator.title: Founder & Director of D'auchy.Studio
creator.about: Shin Uchida is the founder of D'auchy.Studio and the developer behind all the projects and products featured on this website. D'auchy.Studio is Shin Uchida's personal AI product development initiative.
creator.vision: AI is not the goal, but a means. Our mission is to enhance people's creativity and productivity through technology.
creator.projects: Products developed and operated by Shin Uchida: LingaLink (AI language learning platform), EduMate (collaborative study platform), OfficeBrain (enterprise RAG system), Bayd-System (music studio management system)
creator.background: A software engineer and entrepreneur active in AI and educational technology. Based in Japan, developing products for global users.
creator.company: D'auchy.Studio is a Japanese AI product innovation company founded by Shin Uchida. We develop cutting-edge AI solutions for education, enterprise, and creative industries.
creator.chatbot: This chatbot uses a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system developed by Shin Uchida. It answers questions about D'auchy.Studio's products and services.
creator.contact: For inquiries about D'auchy.Studio, please use the contact page on our website.
